title: selenipedium × macrochilum
intro: Selenipedium × macrochilum, also known as the orchid of the moon, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the genus Selenipedium. It is native to Central and South America and is known for its unique and exotic appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Selenipedium × macrochilum is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote overall health and well-being, and is believed to have health benefits including reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health.
